title: 2 Oslo - 1 Flam - 2 Bergen

day_descriptions.Day 1: Arrive Oslo. Norway's capital sits at the head of the Oslofjord. The Aker Brygge waterfront, Vigeland sculpture park and the Opera House rooftop reward an unhurried first evening.
day_descriptions.Day 2: Oslo city tour. The Viking Ship Museum, the Fram polar exploration vessel, and Karl Johans gate. Afternoon at leisure.
day_descriptions.Day 3: Train from Oslo to Myrdal, then the Flåm Railway — one of the world's steepest and most spectacular railway journeys, descending 866 metres through waterfalls and mountain farms to the Aurlandsfjord. Overnight Flåm.
day_descriptions.Day 4: Fjord cruise from Flåm to Bergen through the Nærøyfjord, a UNESCO World Heritage site. Arrive Bergen. The Bryggen wharf, a row of medieval wooden buildings, is one of Scandinavia's most photographed sights.
day_descriptions.Day 5: Bergen at leisure — the Fløibanen funicular for panoramic views, the fish market, the old quarter. Depart.

description: Oslo's fjord city, the Flåm Railway through the Aurlandsfjord and Bergen's colourful Bryggen wharf on a five-night Norway classic.
